name: Cycloid
description: Cycloid offers a comprehensive DevOps platform designed to enhance developer experience through its user-friendly self-service portal. The platform simplifies cloud migration, supports hybrid cloud environments, and centralizes cost management, making it easier to efficiently manage complex cloud infrastructures.

name: Prodevans Technologies
description: Prodevans specializes in transforming IT organizations through advanced cloud and container technologies, which are essential for effective DevOps practices. With a strong track record in implementing Red Hat Cloud Solutions, the company offers valuable expertise in DevOps tools and support.

name: ServerBee
description: Serverbee emphasizes its expertise in DevOps by offering scalable solutions delivered by a skilled Ukrainian team. They highlight the benefits of using containers like Docker, which enhance software delivery and foster improved collaboration among IT specialists, ultimately streamlining development and automation processes through Continuous Integration and Continuous Delivery (CI/CD).

name: DevOps Support
description: DevOps Support specializes in DevOps Consulting along with Cloud consulting and 24/7 Managed services. They emphasize their commitment to expanding their capabilities through their experienced team, which has successfully delivered solutions to clients in the USA and Europe.

name: DevOps.PH
description: DevOps PH, a division of GSYNC Solutions Philippines, specializes in managed services that enhance self-service Cloud and DevOps operations. They focus on providing secure, scalable, and cost-effective IT solutions tailored to optimize performance and meet business needs.

name: AllCloud
description: AllCloud specializes in cloud enablement and transformation, offering comprehensive DevOps services as part of its solutions. With expertise in cloud architecture and managed services, AllCloud supports organizations in achieving operational excellence through secure and scalable DevOps practices.

name: HashiCorp
description: HashiCorp is a leading provider of multi-cloud infrastructure automation products that enhance cloud operations and security, which is crucial for DevOps practices. Their key offering, Terraform, enables infrastructure as code, allowing for consistent provisioning and management of resources, thereby improving IT operations productivity and increasing release velocity.

name: devop1
description: Devop.One specializes in recruiting top-tier freelancers in web and software development, which can be essential for building a skilled DevOps team. They also facilitate the transition from freelancers to permanent employees, ensuring alignment with company culture.

name: Solvd Inc.
description: Solvd offers full-cycle DevOps automation services, emphasizing their expertise in optimizing resources and reducing development time. Their approach supports businesses in adopting DevOps practices that enhance efficiency and user satisfaction.

name: CloudOps
description: CloudOps emphasizes its expertise in DevOps by offering a comprehensive assessment of DevOps platforms and practices, alongside tailored training, support, and consulting services. Their experience and focus on building and operating DevOps platforms position them as a valuable partner for organizations looking to enhance their DevOps capabilities.
